metadata.dc:title: Comprehensive longitudinal dataset (1995-2023) on poverty rates across 30 countries in Sub-Saharan Africa, South Asia, East Asia, Latin America, MENA, and Europe/Central Asia. Variables: poverty rates at $1.90, $3.20, and $5.50/day thresholds, extrem
metadata.dc:creator: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
metadata.dc:description: Comprehensive longitudinal dataset (1995-2023) on poverty rates across 30 countries in Sub-Saharan Africa, South Asia, East Asia, Latin America, MENA, and Europe/Central Asia. Variables: poverty rates at $1.90, $3.20, and $5.50/day thresholds, extrem
metadata.dc:subject: cc0, dataset, gini-coefficient, global-poverty, hdi, longitudinal-dataset, multidimensional-poverty, open-data, poverty-rates, world-bank, zenodo
